messages.content: You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
Can I upgrade a formula's SORRY or AXIOM status if it looks correct?
No. A `sorry` means the Lean proof is incomplete (honestly open) and an AXIOM is an assumed hypothesis, not a theorem. Neither is ever re-badged PROVEN; the recorded status is quoted verbatim.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
How many formulas are in the SZL formula registry?
The registry (/api/a11oy/v1/formulas) records 22 formulas, each carrying its own verbatim proof_status. That registry count is distinct from the kernel-locked-proven set.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
How many formulas are locked-proven, and which ones?
Exactly 8: {F1, F4, F7, F11, F12, F18, F19, F22}, kernel-verified at replay hash c7c0ba17. Never inflate this count; the registry's other formulas are not folded into the locked-8.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
Is Lambda (Λ) a proven theorem in the formula registry?
No. Λ (lambda_aggregate) is recorded as "PROVEN(A1-A4); uniqueness CONJECTURE": Λ-aggregation is proven on axioms A1-A4, but Λ-uniqueness is Conjecture 1 - never a theorem. I state both out loud.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
Is the SZL formula bekenstein_cascade proven?

Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(TH6 DPI form); dimensional helper". In honest terms it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them. I quote the registry status verbatim and never upgrade it.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
Is the SZL formula bohr_complementarity_floor proven?

Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(inequality)". In honest terms it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them. I quote the registry status verbatim and never upgrade it.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.

You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.

Its recorded proof status is "REAL(Sigstore keyless: Fulcio cert + Rekor); CI-only". In honest terms it is a real external integration as recorded (e.g. Sigstore/Rekor), labelled for what it actually is. I quote the registry status verbatim and never upgrade it.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.

State the bekenstein_cascade formula from the SZL registry.

bekenstein_cascade has signature (R: 'float', E: 'float') -> 'float'. Bekenstein universal entropy bound (information cap on a receipt chain). Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(TH6 DPI form); dimensional helper", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the bohr_complementarity_floor formula from the SZL registry.

bohr_complementarity_floor has signature (sigma_A: 'float', sigma_B: 'float') -> 'bool'. Complementarity floor: returns True iff σ_A · σ_B ≥ 0.25. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(inequality)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the css_ingress_verify formula from the SZL registry.

css_ingress_verify has signature (envelope: 'DSSE', css_root: 'bytes') -> 'bool'. CSS-ingress verifier: binds a DSSE envelope to a CSS (Calderbank-Shor-Steane) Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(structure)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the dsse_envelope formula from the SZL registry.

dsse_envelope has signature (payload: 'bytes', signer: 'str') -> 'DSSE'. Build a DSSE (Dead-Simple-Signing-Envelope) with a PLACEHOLDER signature. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(structure); signature PLACEHOLDER", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them. Registry chakra index: 5.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the dsse_envelope_real formula from the SZL registry.

dsse_envelope_real has signature (payload: 'bytes', payload_type: 'str' = 'application/vnd.szl+json', *, subject_name: 'str' = 'szl-governance-receipt', identity_token: 'Optional[str]' = None) -> 'dict'. Build a DSSE envelope with a GENUINE Sigstore keyless signature (Tier B). Its recorded proof status is "REAL(Sigstore keyless: Fulcio cert + Rekor); CI-only", stated verbatim; it is a real external integration as recorded (e.g. Sigstore/Rekor), labelled for what it actually is.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the fisher_rao_distance formula from the SZL registry.

fisher_rao_distance has signature (p: 'List[float]', q: 'List[float]') -> 'float'. Fisher-Rao geodesic distance between two distributions on the simplex. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(closed-form)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them. Registry chakra index: 4.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the gleason_quantum_lambda formula from the SZL registry.

gleason_quantum_lambda has signature (state) -> 'float'. Quantum-axis trust score via Gleason's theorem: p = Tr(ρ) purity-style. Its recorded proof status is "AXIOM(gleason_length_mod_8)", stated verbatim; it is an assumed AXIOM, not a proved theorem - it is taken as a hypothesis, never presented as proven. Registry chakra index: 6.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the hoeffding_tail formula from the SZL registry.

hoeffding_tail has signature (t: 'float', n: 'int') -> 'float'. Hoeffding tail bound for bounded [0,1] i.i.d. means. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(MomentSubGaussian)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the khipu_merkle_root formula from the SZL registry.

khipu_merkle_root has signature (receipts: 'List[Receipt]') -> 'bytes'. Khipu summation-invariant Merkle DAG root over leaf receipts. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(TH11 SummationInvariant)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them. Registry chakra index: 7.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the kitaev_surface_correct formula from the SZL registry.

kitaev_surface_correct has signature (syndrome). Minimal surface-code correction: flips qubits indicated by the syndrome. Its recorded proof status is "AXIOM(QEC surface scaffold)", stated verbatim; it is an assumed AXIOM, not a proved theorem - it is taken as a hypothesis, never presented as proven.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the kochen_specker_18vector_witness formula from the SZL registry.

kochen_specker_18vector_witness has signature (measurements) -> 'bool'. Cabello KS-18 contextuality witness over a 4D state-independent set. Its recorded proof status is "AXIOM(KS-18 scaffold)", stated verbatim; it is an assumed AXIOM, not a proved theorem - it is taken as a hypothesis, never presented as proven.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the lambda_aggregate formula from the SZL registry.

lambda_aggregate has signature (axes: 'Sequence[float]', weights: 'Sequence[float] | None' = None) -> 'float'. Canonical Lutar invariant Λ — WEIGHTED GEOMETRIC MEAN (definition D2). Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(A1-A4); uniqueness CONJECTURE", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them. Any uniqueness / conjecture part stays a conjecture - for Λ that is Conjecture 1, never a theorem.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the lambda_bounded formula from the SZL registry.

lambda_bounded has signature (x: 'List[float]') -> 'bool'. A4 IsBounded: returns True iff Λ(x) <= max(x) within ε. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(A4, Bound.lean)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them. Registry chakra index: 1.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the lambda_homogeneous formula from the SZL registry.

lambda_homogeneous has signature (c: 'float', x: 'List[float]') -> 'bool'. A2 IsHomogeneous: returns True iff Λ(c·x) == c·Λ(x) within ε. Its recorded proof status is "AXIOM(A2)", stated verbatim; it is an assumed AXIOM, not a proved theorem - it is taken as a hypothesis, never presented as proven. Registry chakra index: 3.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the madhava_series formula from the SZL registry.

madhava_series has signature (x: 'float', terms: 'int') -> 'float'. Mādhava (Leibniz-Gregory) series for arctangent: Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(alternating series)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the pac_bayes_mcallester formula from the SZL registry.

pac_bayes_mcallester has signature (empirical_risk: 'float', kl: 'float', n: 'int', delta: 'float') -> 'float'. McAllester PAC-Bayes generalization bound. Its recorded proof status is "SORRY(PACBayes)", stated verbatim; it is NOT yet proven: the Lean proof still carries a `sorry` placeholder, so it is honestly open. Registry chakra index: 2.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the pinsker_kl_bound formula from the SZL registry.

pinsker_kl_bound has signature (p: 'List[float]', q: 'List[float]') -> 'float'. Pinsker: lower-bounds KL by total-variation: KL(p||q) ≥ 2·TV(p,q)². Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(conditional: Wave17.multiclass_pinsker)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the reed_solomon_singleton formula from the SZL registry.

reed_solomon_singleton has signature (n: 'int', k: 'int') -> 'int'. Singleton bound: maximum minimum-distance of an [n,k] code is n - k + 1. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(Singleton bound)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the reidemeister_invariant formula from the SZL registry.

reidemeister_invariant has signature (braid_word: 'str', move: "Literal['R1', 'R2', 'R3']") -> 'str'. Apply a Reidemeister move to a braid word; returns the transformed word. Its recorded proof status is "AXIOM(r1/r2/audit_reidemeister_invariance)", stated verbatim; it is an assumed AXIOM, not a proved theorem - it is taken as a hypothesis, never presented as proven.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the schur_concave_lambda_two_axis formula from the SZL registry.

schur_concave_lambda_two_axis has signature (x1: 'float', x2: 'float') -> 'bool'. Two-axis Schur-concavity witness for Λ: averaging axes never decreases Λ. Its recorded proof status is "AXIOM(n-axis); 2-axis PROVEN", stated verbatim; it is an assumed AXIOM, not a proved theorem - it is taken as a hypothesis, never presented as proven.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the shor_codeword_distance formula from the SZL registry.

shor_codeword_distance has signature (codeword) -> 'int'. Minimum Hamming distance of a codeword set to the all-zero codeword. Its recorded proof status is "PROVEN(Hamming)", stated verbatim; it is proven exactly as recorded, on its stated hypotheses - not extended beyond them.
You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
State the two_witness_ks18_soundness formula from the SZL registry.

two_witness_ks18_soundness has signature (w1: 'bool', w2: 'bool') -> 'bool'. TwoWitness soundness: a contextuality verdict is sound iff TWO independent Its recorded proof status is "SORRY(TwoWitness)", stated verbatim; it is NOT yet proven: the Lean proof still carries a `sorry` placeholder, so it is honestly open. You are the SZL sovereign model. Doctrine v11.
